RULING: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER ADVANCING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE
Hearing held and tentative ruling amended as follows: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Advancing the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. Sec 36(a). Opposition filed by Hennessy Industries, LLC. The trial date of March 8, 2021 is vacated. The new trial date is November 30, 2020 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. Sec 36(f) is December 11, 2020. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court. The last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is November 25, 2020. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant provisions of the C.C.P., unless the parties stipulate otherwise. The Court will allow a maximum of four summary judgment/adjudication motions per day to be calendared in this action. Before a party files and serves such motion, it must contact the Court's Calendar Clerk to make a reservation. Discovery is closed to all other defendants except for Defendant Fraser Boiler's Service. Time to respond to written discovery that has not yet been served is shortened to 20 days. For written discovery that has already been served, responses are due within 20 days of this hearing or by the date determined by the C.C.P., whichever is earlier. If there is any kind of issue/dispute that requires meet and cobnfer, such meet and confer shall not be made via email or letter. It shall occur in person or via telephone. Electronic service is considered the equivalent of personal service. Fact discovery cut-off date is November 13, 2020. Expert discovery cut-off date is November 27d, 2020. All bankruptcy documents shall be turned over to defendants no later than September 11, 2020. If plaintiffs submit documents to bankruptcy trusts after this date, they must notify defendants of this no later than five days after submission. The fact discovery cut-off does not apply to bankruptcy documents.

No later than August 27, 2020 plaintiffs must provide a statement to each defendant stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiffs' claims as to each defendant. A case management conference is set for October 15, 2020 at 1:30 p.m. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone.
